github.title: garycoding/deco-assaying
github.summary: 【GitHub】MCP server for code parsing via tree-sitter (Python/C/C++ initially, broader language coverage planned) （⭐ 0）

github.title: corvyn-ai/corvyn
github.summary: 【GitHub】Open source AI routing proxy that automatically routes requests to free models and shows costs in your local currency — ₹ ₦ R$ ₱ and 60+ more. Works with OpenCode and Claude Code. （⭐ 2）
github.summary_zh: 【GitHub】开源人工智能路由代理，可自动将请求路由到免费模型，并以您的本地货币显示成本— ₹ ”R $”和60多个。适用于OpenCode和Claude Code。（⭐ 2 ）
github.summary_en: 【GitHub】Open source AI routing proxy that automatically routes requests to free models and shows costs in your local currency — ₹ ₦ R$ ₱ and 60+ more. Works with OpenCode and Claude Code. （⭐ 2）

github.title: serafim-builds/PersonaOS
github.summary: 【GitHub】An open-source AI that quietly remembers who you are — in plain markdown you fully own. Works with Claude Code, Codex CLI, opencode, and any other agent that reads AGENTS.md. （⭐ 2）
github.summary_zh: 【GitHub】一个开源的人工智能，可以悄悄地记住您是谁--在简单的扣分中，您完全拥有。适用于Claude Code、Codex CLI、opencode和任何其他读取AGENTS.md的代理。（⭐ 2 ）
github.summary_en: 【GitHub】An open-source AI that quietly remembers who you are — in plain markdown you fully own. Works with Claude Code, Codex CLI, opencode, and any other agent that reads AGENTS.md. （⭐ 2）

models.title: ‘This is fine’ creator says AI startup stole his art
models.summary: The ad comes from Artisan, the AI startup behind billboards urging businesses to "stop hiring humans."
models.title_zh: “这很好”的创作者说，人工智能初创公司偷了他的艺术品
models.summary_zh: 这则广告来自广告牌背后的人工智能初创公司Artisan ，该公司敦促企业“停止雇用人类”。
models.title_en: ‘This is fine’ creator says AI startup stole his art
models.summary_en: The ad comes from Artisan, the AI startup behind billboards urging businesses to "stop hiring humans."

models.title: In Harvard study, AI offered more accurate emergency room diagnoses than two human doctors
models.summary: A new study examines how large language models perform in a variety of medical contexts, including real emergency room cases — where at least one model seemed to be more accurate than human doctors.
models.title_zh: 在哈佛大学的研究中，人工智能提供的急诊室诊断比两名人类医生更准确
models.summary_zh: 一项新的研究考察了大型语言模型在各种医疗环境中的表现，包括真实的急诊室病例—其中至少有一个模型似乎比人类医生更准确。
models.title_en: In Harvard study, AI offered more accurate emergency room diagnoses than two human doctors
models.summary_en: A new study examines how large language models perform in a variety of medical contexts, including real emergency room cases — where at least one model seemed to be more accurate than human doctors.
